cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my little brother George

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mummy Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This is Daddy Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I'm Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: leoi4 jyu5
cards.english: [Thunderstorm]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: gam1 jat6 joeng4 gwong1 pou2 ziu3
cards.english: Today is sunny

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: tung4 ceot1 lei4 je5 caan1
cards.english: Peppa and George are going out for a picnic

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 呢杯橙汁畀你飲㗎，熊仔
cards.jyutping: ne1 bui1 caang2 zap1 bei2 nei5 jam2 gaa4 hung4 zai2
cards.english: This glass of orange juice is for you, Teddy

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 gong2 di1 me1 aa3
cards.english: What do you want to say?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: m4 goi1 saai3 nei5 aa3
cards.english: Thank you, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: nei5 m4 sai2 gam3 haak3 hei3 wo3 hung4 zai2
cards.english: You're welcome, Bear.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 呢一杯橙汁就畀你飲嘅，恐龍先生
cards.jyutping: ne1 jat1 bui1 caang2 zap1 zau6 bei2 nei5 jam2 ge3 hung2 lung4 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This glass of orange juice is for you, Mr. Dinosaur.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 gong2 di1 me1 aa3
cards.english: What do you want to say?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 恐龍先生，你都唔使咁客氣喎
cards.jyutping: hung2 lung4 sin1 saang1 nei5 dou1 m4 sai2 gam3 haak3 hei3 wo3
cards.english: You're welcome too, Mr. Dinosaur.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 熊仔同恐龍先生想唔想食啲曲奇啊？
cards.jyutping: hung4 zai2 tung4 hung2 lung4 sin1 saang1 soeng2 m4 soeng2 sik6 di1 kuk1 kei4 aa3
cards.english: Bear and Mr. Dinosaur, would you like some cookies?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 m4 hai6 hou2 tou5 ngo6 zaa3
cards.english: I'm not very hungry.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: tung4 ho2 ji5 sik6 saai3 di1 kuk1 kei4 gaa4
cards.english: Peppa and George can eat all the cookies.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: do1 ze6 nei5 aa3 hung4 zai2
cards.english: Thank you, Bear.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: ni1 di1 gwaai3 sing1 hai6 me1 lai4 gaa4 ne1
cards.english: What are these strange noises?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: faai3 di1 laa1 faan2 lai2 uk1 kei2 aa3
cards.english: Hurry up, come back home!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 媽咪，頭先有一下轟隆聲啊
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 tau4 sin1 jau5 jat1 haa6 gwang1 lung4 sing1 aa3
cards.english: Mommy, there was a booming sound just now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: hai6 leoi4 sing1 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: That's thunder, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 噉係代表好快會有雷暴同埋傾盆大雨啊
cards.jyutping: gam2 hai6 doi6 biu2 hou2 faai3 wui6 jau5 leoi4 bou6 tung4 maai4 king1 pun4 daai6 jyu5 aa3
cards.english: Does that mean there will be a thunderstorm and heavy rain soon?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 快啲啦，喺未來雨之前返入屋啦
cards.jyutping: faai3 di1 laa1 hai2 mei6 loi4 jyu5 zi1 cin4 faan1 jap6 uk1 laa1
cards.english: Hurry up, let's get back inside before the rain comes.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 唔使咁驚喎，個天係唔會咁快就落雨𠸏
cards.jyutping: m4 sai2 gam3 ging1 wo3 go3 tin1 hai6 m4 wui6 gam3 faai3 zau6 lok6 jyu5 ge2
cards.english: Don't be so scared, it won't rain that quickly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 個天越嚟越黑，好快就會有雷雨喇
cards.jyutping: go3 tin1 jyut6 lai4 jyut6 hak1 hou2 faai3 zau6 wui6 jau5 leoi4 jyu5 laa3
cards.english: The sky is getting darker, there will be a thunderstorm soon.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 有冇帶返晒你哋啲玩具入屋啊？
cards.jyutping: jau5 mou5 daai3 faan1 saai3 nei5 dei6 di1 wun6 geoi6 jap6 uk1 aa3
cards.english: Did you bring all your toys back inside?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: hung2 lung4
cards.english: Dinosaur.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: hou2 hung2 lung4 sin1 saang1 on1 cyun4 laa3
cards.english: Okay, Mr. Dinosaur is safe.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 熊仔啊，我將熊仔漏咗喺花園喇
cards.jyutping: hung4 zai2 aa3 ngo5 zoeng1 hung4 zai2 lau6 zo2 hai2 faa1 jyun4 laa3
cards.english: Teddy, I left Teddy in the garden.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 wui6 zing2 sap1 gaa4
cards.english: He'll get wet.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 放心啦，Peppa，爹哋會救返熊仔返嚟
cards.jyutping: fong3 sam1 laa1 de1 dei6 wui6 gau3 faan1 hung4 zai2 faan2 lai2
cards.english: Don't worry, Peppa, Daddy will rescue Teddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: gam2 nei5 jiu3 faai3 di1 laa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Then you have to hurry, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: go3 tin1 zau6 faai3 lok6 jyu5 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: It's going to rain soon.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: leoi4 jyu5 zaa1 maa1 ngo5 hou2 cing1 co2 gaa4
cards.english: Thunderstorm, I know all about it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: jau5 paai4 dou1 m4 wui6 lok6 jyu5 aa3
cards.english: It won't rain for a while.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 果然冇估錯，有排都唔會落雨啊
cards.jyutping: gwo2 jin4 mou5 gu2 co3 jau5 paai4 dou1 m4 wui6 lok6 jyu5 aa3
cards.english: Just as I thought, it won't rain for a while.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 熊仔好可憐啊，佢成身濕晒喇
cards.jyutping: hung4 zai2 hou2 ho2 lin4 aa3 keoi5 sing4 san1 sap1 saai3 laa3
cards.english: Poor bear, he's all wet.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 係啊，熊仔好可憐啊，快啲抹乾佢啦
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 hung4 zai2 hou2 ho2 lin4 aa3 faai3 di1 maat3 gon1 keoi5 laa1
cards.english: Yes, poor bear, let's quickly dry him off.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: hung4 zai2 hou2 ho2 lin4 aa3
cards.english: Poor bear.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 抹乾晒喇，熊仔，你唔會再濕㗎喇
cards.jyutping: maat3 gon1 saai3 laa3 hung4 zai2 nei5 m4 wui6 zoi3 sap1 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: All dry now, bear, you won't be wet anymore.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 我呢個爹哋都好可憐㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ni1 go3 de1 dei6 dou1 hou2 ho2 lin4 gaa4
cards.english: This daddy is also very pitiful.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 jat1 joeng6 sing4 san1 sap1 saai3 aa3
cards.english: I'm all wet too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: ai1 jaa3 deoi3 m4 zyu6 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Oops, sorry daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 maat3 gon1 nei5 haa6
cards.english: Let me dry you off now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 抹乾晒喇，爹哋，你而家唔再濕喇
cards.jyutping: maat3 gon1 saai3 laa3 de1 dei6 nei5 ji4 gaa1 m4 zoi3 sap1 laa3
cards.english: All dry now, Daddy, you're not wet anymore.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: juk1
cards.english: Oh

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: jau5 jyu5 dik6 zo2 jap6 uk1 aa3
cards.english: Some rain dripped into the house

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: go3 dei6 baan2 sap1 saai3 laa3
cards.english: The floor is all wet

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 弊喇，我哋應該點做啊，爹哋？
cards.jyutping: bai6 laa3 ngo5 dei6 jing1 goi1 dim2 zou6 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Oh no, what should we do, Daddy?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: fong3 sam1 laa1
cards.english: Don't worry

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 豬先生用一個水桶裝住啲水
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 jung6 jat1 go3 seoi2 tung2 zong1 zyu6 di1 seoi2
cards.english: Mr. Pig used a bucket to hold the water

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: zou6 dak1 hou2 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Good job, Daddy

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: waa6 gam3 ji6 laa1
cards.english: Easy peasy

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: me1 waa6
cards.english: What?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 快啲啊，快啲揾其他嘢嚟裝水啦
cards.jyutping: faai3 di1 aa3 faai3 di1 wan2 kei4 taa1 je5 lai4 zong1 seoi2 laa1
cards.english: Hurry, quickly find something else to hold the water

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: zou6 dak1 hou2 aa3
cards.english: Well done, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: waa6 gam3 ji6 laa1
cards.english: Easy peasy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 di1 leoi4 sing1 hou2 daai6 sing1 aa3
cards.english: Mommy, the thunder is so loud.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 放心啦，細路，你哋唔使咁驚㗎
cards.jyutping: fong3 sam1 laa1 sai3 lou6 nei5 dei6 m4 sai2 gam3 ging1 gaa4
cards.english: Don't worry, kids, you don't have to be so scared.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 一齊數下閃電同行雷隔咗幾多秒？
cards.jyutping: jat1 cai4 sou3 haa6 sim2 din6 tung4 haang4 leoi4 gaak3 zo2 gei2 do1 miu5
cards.english: Let's count how many seconds apart the lightning and thunder are.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 佢哋隔得越耐，就代表啲閃電嚟我哋越遠
cards.jyutping: keoi5 dei6 gaak3 dak1 jyut6 noi6 zau6 doi6 biu2 di1 sim2 din6 lai4 ngo5 dei6 jyut6 jyun5
cards.english: The longer they are apart, the farther away the lightning is from us.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: jat1 ji6 saam1
cards.english: One, two, three...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: hai6 saam1 miu5 aa3
cards.english: It's three seconds.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: jat1 ji6 saam1 sei3 ng5 jat1 ji6 saam1 sei3 ng5
cards.english: - One, two, three, four, five... - One, two, three, four, five...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 隔咗五秒啊，啲閃電嚟我哋遠咗喇
cards.jyutping: gaak3 zo2 ng5 miu5 aa3 di1 sim2 din6 lai4 ngo5 dei6 jyun5 zo2 laa3
cards.english: It's five seconds apart, the lightning is farther away from us.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: go2 coeng4 leoi4 jyu5 ji5 ging1 lok6 jyun4 laa3
cards.english: That thunderstorm is over now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5 hou2 je5
cards.english: - Great! - Great!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 雷雨令到花園布滿晒泥氹喎
cards.jyutping: leoi4 jyu5 ling6 dou3 faa1 jyun4 bou3 mun5 saai3 nai4 tam5 wo3
cards.english: The thunderstorm has left the garden full of muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: Peppa好鍾意喺泥氹度跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: hou2 zung1 ji3 hai2 nai4 tam5 dou6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: Peppa loves jumping up and down in muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.characters: 大家都好鍾意喺泥氹度跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 dou1 hou2 zung1 ji3 hai2 nai4 tam5 dou6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: Everyone loves jumping up and down in muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hou2 zung1 ji3 leoi4 jyu5 aa3
cards.english: I love thunderstorms!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E32 Thunderstorm［雷雨］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 dei6 wui6 zing2 di1 nai4 tam5 ceot1 lei4
cards.english: They'll make some muddy puddles.
